data/maps/Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadSou.Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadSouthEntrance: On CYCLING ROAD, you can go all out\nand cycle as fast as you'd like.\pIt feels great to go that fast, but try\nnot to crash into anyone!
Sorry, you can't walk on CYCLING\nROAD. It's too dangerous.\pPlease come back with a BIKE.
